title: Foreign Labor Application Gateway (FLAG) Online Filing Release Notes 05/28/2025 | Flag.dol.gov
content:
## Foreign Labor Application Gateway (FLAG) Online Filing Release Notes 05/28/2025
- The PERM Case details page now shows the following new fields: Determination Date Appeals Receipt Date NORD Issued Date BALCA Transmittal Date BALCA Decision Date Expiration Date
- Appeals Receipt Date
- BALCA Transmittal Date
- PERM filers can now upload additional documentation as part of the Request for Reconsideration.
- When a PERM filer submits documentation through the help desk, those files will now be available to view in the case details page.
- H-2B filers can now submit post-certification requests
